problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
hypothesis: If Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction is applied to it, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
